notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed package describes mostly public/visible events (fighting 困境, collecting immortal gu, forming cooperation agreements, etc.) that are ordinary visible events, not hidden knowledge. No private motives, secret plans, future-known information, or directly supported knowledge gaps are clearly evidenced in the source pointers. The entities and relations are marked 'ambiguous' but the actual source quotes do not reveal any hidden/private fact that would qualify as a hidden fact candidate.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly event summaries and entity descriptions but lacks direct narrative text showing character internal thoughts or clear motive-driven actions. Most observed behaviors (e.g., cooperating, picking up gu, falling from exhaustion) are procedural/mechanical actions in a trial setting, not revealing of deeper motives. Any inferred motive would be speculative without direct source support.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed contains individuals (黑楼兰, 鲁桐兰, 焦火, 黄钟族长, 六转蛊仙, 八转蛊仙, 七转青年蛊仙) but no named collective faction, clan, family, or group with a concrete stake. 焦火 is described as '焦火族长' (clan chief) but '焦火' itself is used as a person name, not a named clan/faction entity in the seed. 黄钟族长 is a title (clan chief of 黄钟) but the clan '黄钟' is not established as a collective actor with stakes in the seed facts. The relations and events only involve individuals. No collective actor with a concrete stake can be confidently extracted.
IF export filter quarantined 6 legacy old-schema branches.
